title: Hypercity Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Hypercity Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Hypercity Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hypercity Advisory Limited:
Hypercity Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hypercity Advisory Limited!
